name: Write Lattice Data
description: Writes a value to the user's workspace ('w') or operations ('o') namespace at the given path. Path must start with 'w/' or 'o/' followed by a key (e.g. 'w/my-notes', 'o/my-operation'). Writing to other namespaces (g, s, j) is not permitted — those are framework-managed. The value can be any JSON-compatible type (string, number, boolean, object, array, null). Writing null removes the entry (equivalent to delete). Returns {written: true} on success.

path.description: Path to write, e.g. 'w/my-notes' or 'o/my-operation'. Must start with 'w/' (workspace) or 'o/' (operations).

value.description: The value to store. Can be any JSON-compatible type: string, number, boolean, object, array, or null.

written.description: True if the value was written successfully
